name: twork/faq-accordion-section
title: FAQ Accordion Section
description: FAQ section with accordion items, contact link, and no-JS details/summary fallback.

attributes.question: What products does Shwe Myanmar Foodstuff Industry make?
attributes.answer: We specialize in premium butter (ထောပတ်) and ghee under the Shwe Myanmar (ရွှေမြန်မာ) brand. Our flagship product is available in multiple sizes including the 10 Viss bulk pack (≈ 16.33 kg).

attributes.question: What does '10 Viss' mean?
attributes.answer: Viss is a traditional Burmese unit of weight. 10 Viss equals approximately 16.33 kg (36 lbs). Our 10 Viss pack is designed for wholesale, restaurants, and commercial kitchens.

attributes.question: How can I place an order?
attributes.answer: Contact us by phone: 095-2-55122, 095-2-55123, or 095-9-200 1227. Our team in Mandalay will assist with retail and wholesale orders.
